problem id: ae73892e
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(2) XOR SHR(3)

examples:
  11111111 -> 11100011
  11011010 -> 01110011
  01101000 -> 10101101
  11011101 -> 01101111
  00101110 -> 10111101
  00000001 -> 00000100
  00000111 -> 00011100
  11101001 -> 10111001
  10111100 -> 11100111
  01101111 -> 10110001

query: 01001110
predicted answer: 00110001
